Label: Attack
Notes: Built‑in hotkey that attacks your last target or selected target; ID numbers vary by client.

Label: Last Target
Notes: Targets the last thing you acted on; built into Razor; verify ID via the client.

Label: Target Self
Notes: Targets your character; part of the built‑in targeting commands.

Label: Disarm (Special Move)
Notes: Activates the ‘Disarm’ special move; do not confuse with a Play: Disarm Toggle macro.

Label: Equip Set 'Dexxer'
Notes: Equips the items defined in an Arm/Dress list; built‑in dress hotkey.

Label: Use Once Agent
Notes: Triggers the Use Once agent to consume a trapped pouch or other item; built‑in agent command.

Label: Organizer Agent 1
Notes: Runs the first Organizer agent; built‑in agent command.

Label: Restock Agent
Notes: Runs the Restock agent to pull items from a storage container; built‑in agent command.

Label: Drink Greater Heal Potion
Notes: Uses the greater heal potion in your backpack or hand; built‑in item action.

Label: Cast 'Teleport'
Notes: Casts the teleport spell; built‑in spell command.

Label: Skill 'Hiding'
Notes: Uses the Hiding skill; built‑in skill command.

Label: Play: Recall
Notes: Executes a user‑defined macro named ‘Recall’; the ‘Play:’ wrapper indicates a macro; internal ID is 0 for macro calls.

Label: Play: Last Target Script
Notes: Executes a user script named ‘Last Target Script’; scripts are invoked with HotKeyAction|0|Play:Name; confirm that the script exists.
